decision: Add migration 1781568000300_rbac-identity.js (users/roles/user_roles/pending_grants/auth_audit). In-code permission catalog (lib/rbac/permissions.ts) per spec §3. lib/rbac/{permissions,allowlist,reconcile,store}.ts. requireRole() in lib/auth.ts. Retire NEXT_PUBLIC_ADMIN_MODE via server-side /api/auth/access + useAdminAccess hook in settings/{page,layout} + provenance/page. Reconcile at instrumentation boot under pg_advisory_xact_lock. Group->role sync at JIT (granted_by=group-sync). Pending grants for never-logged-in admins materialized at JIT.
rationale: pending_grants needed because user_roles FKs users(subject) which does not exist until first login; keying pending on email/username resolves the bootstrap/lockout tension.
tests: unit (permissions/reconcile/allowlist), integration (xmax JIT, revoked-no-regrant, first-admin bootstrap, reconcile prunes only reconcile grants), e2e (admin gate).
constraints: No terminal-server/Dockerfile/compose edits (owned elsewhere); terminal-op enforcement noted as HTTP-route-scoped only.
